The '''Sabaoth destroyer''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] used by the forces of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cavik Toth]] prior to and during the initial stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Captain Toth himself used one of these destroyers as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]].<ref name="SW:JS" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Destroyer_Geonosis.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A Sabaoth destroyer in orbit of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].]]

The Sabaoth destroyer was an immense, armored warship, designed for capital ship warfare. To this end, it was armed with six [[capital ship turret]]s and eleven heavy anti-starfighter [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser turrets]] arrayed across its hull.<ref name="SW:JS" /> Its hull possessed a two-pronged style similar to the [[Sabaoth starfighter]]s and [[Sabaoth Defender]]s it carried.

While its high level of maneuverability helped it to avoid enemy fire, it carried on average 12 support craft—including [[Sabaoth starfighter]]s and [[Sabaoth Defender]]s, in its lower hangar bay to end any starfighter threat.<ref name="TCWCG" /> The hangar of Toth's flagship carried the Captain's [[Cavik Toth's starfighter|personal starfighter]].<ref name="SW:JS" />

==History==
Sabaoth destroyers participated in the battle above [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], though all three vessels were destroyed by the [[Zeta Squadron (Jedi Order)|Zeta Squadron]] led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and Captain [[Nym/Legends|Nym]]. Captain Toth's own flagship was destroyed in the battle, along with Toth himself.<ref name="SW:JS" />

==Notable vessels==
*[[Reaver (Sabaoth destroyer)|''Reaver'']]

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Sabaoth_Destroyer_concept_2.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Destroyer concept art from ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''.]]

Early screens from [[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter|''Jedi Starfighter'']], as seen in the game trailer, show the Sabaoth Destroyer as a water-based vessel in the game's second level. An [[Trade Federation Battleship (aquatic)|Aquatic Trade Federation battleship]] would later take this position.

Their bows are similar to the [[Munificent-class star frigate/Legends|''Munificent''-class star frigate]], a common ship in the navy of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
